_comment: Example /v1/registry-metadata document. This is discovery metadata only; canonical trust state lives in the Registry Trust Record referenced by registry_trust_uri.

_notes.stable_identifier: registry_id is stable across planned key rotation.
_notes.crl_distribution: endpoints.crl may point at a CDN origin. Verifiers bind the CRL to the Registry by verifying the signed CRL against the accepted Registry Trust Record.
_notes.trust_model: Verifiers fetch the Registry Trust Record from registry_trust_uri and pin trust state from that record, not from this metadata document.
_notes.catalog_sync: The Registry syncs scope, scope-family, and namespace metadata from the pinned catalog identified by aip_catalog_snapshot_id and aip_catalog_sha256, then exposes the synced view through /v1/scopes and /v1/namespaces.
_notes.step_claim_timeout: Claimed Approval Envelope steps that are not completed or failed within step_claim_timeout_seconds from claimed_at are automatically failed by the Registry.
